Describe what is happening in the initial presentation of the dish.
canonical_answer: A dark-colored bowl with a patterned rim sits on a wooden surface containing a creamy salad mixture. Green broccoli florets are coated in white dressing alongside dark red dried fruit pieces. Large text overlay identifies the dish as broccoli salad in green and white fonts. A logo watermark appears in the top left corner throughout the scene.

question: Describe the sequence of visual scenes presented from the beginning of the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a bowl filled with broccoli salad and creamy dressing is shown; at 6s, the salad appears on a white ceramic plate with dried fruit; at 10s, black cursive text animates on a white background; at 16s, a hand uses a silver knife to chop green broccoli on a wooden board.

question: Describe the specific text overlays and preparation actions visible during the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, large text overlay identifies the dish as broccoli salad; at 12s, a black silhouette icon of a chef hat appears above the text; at 16s, a human hand cuts green broccoli florets into smaller pieces; at 18s, multiple cut pieces scatter across the light wooden cutting board surface.
